# Verity Mod for Minecraft Guide

> VerityModChecker.online is an independent Verity Mod source checker, download guide, and troubleshooting hub for Minecraft Java, Bedrock, MCPE, VERITY.exe, Groq, Ollama, and voice setup searches.

## Core Pages

- [Verity Mod Download for Minecraft](https://veritymodchecker.online/): Current Java and Bedrock release map plus a browser-only URL, release record, filename, displayed-size, package, and SHA-256 checker.
- [Verity Mod Download Route](https://veritymodchecker.online/download/): Exact current CurseForge records for Verity JE, Verity BE, and the PnTMC Bedrock alternate, plus the verified official Verity JE Modrinth route and route separation for VERITY.exe.
- [What Is the Verity Mod?](https://veritymodchecker.online/what-is-verity-mod/): Separates the ThatMob horror character and video experience from current playable Java and Bedrock community projects.
- [How to Get Verity Mod](https://veritymodchecker.online/how-to-get-verity-mod/): Edition-specific Java and Bedrock installation order, source checks, and first-launch troubleshooting.
- [What Happened to Verity Mod?](https://veritymodchecker.online/what-happened/): Explains old 404 links, current projects, and project-name confusion.
- [Verity JE Download Status](https://veritymodchecker.online/java/#versions): Java route for Forge 1.20.1, NeoForge 1.21.1, Groq, Ollama, and voice setup.
- [Verity Mod Java Route](https://veritymodchecker.online/java/): Java install and troubleshooting guide.
- [Verity Mod Bedrock Route](https://veritymodchecker.online/bedrock/): Bedrock addon and MCPE setup guide.
- [Verity Mod MCPE Route](https://veritymodchecker.online/bedrock/#mcpe): Mobile import, pack activation, and clean-world checks.
- [What Is VERITY.exe?](https://veritymodchecker.online/verity-exe/): Separates the VERITY.exe modpack from standalone Java and Bedrock routes.
- [Best AI Model for Verity Mod](https://veritymodchecker.online/ai-model/): Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama, voice, latency, and credential-safety guidance.
- [Verity Mod API Connection Failed](https://veritymodchecker.online/api-connection-failed/): Status-code diagnosis for Groq 401 and 429, OpenRouter errors, Ollama connections, and silent replies.
- [How to Talk to Verity](https://veritymodchecker.online/how-to-talk-to-verity/): Project-specific Java controls, Verity BE chat prefix, and PnTMC wake phrase and distance rules.
- [Verity Mod Not Working](https://veritymodchecker.online/not-working/): Fixes for crashes, box not spawning, dialogue missing, and broken setup.
- [Verity Mod Voice Not Working](https://veritymodchecker.online/voice-not-working/): Voice and audio troubleshooting.
- [Verity Mod Taken Down or 404](https://veritymodchecker.online/taken-down/): Recovery checklist for old links, mirrors, and removed pages.
- [Verified Release Data](https://veritymodchecker.online/data/verity-releases.json): Machine-readable owners, project IDs, current file records, versions, sizes, dates, and source URLs.
- [Verified Route Update Feed](https://veritymodchecker.online/feed.xml): Atom feed for point-in-time Java and Bedrock route checks.

## Current Position

Checked July 24, 2026: Verity JE's current Forge file is `verity-5.7.3.jar` for Minecraft 1.20.1. It appears as CurseForge record `8461257` and Modrinth version `yAt0wv1Z` under project `on1Y0osD`; Modrinth publishes SHA-1 and SHA-512 fingerprints for this file. Verity BE's current file is `Verity (Stable) (1.0.9)-(26.3).mcaddon`, record `8486588`, for Bedrock 26.30. The 1.0.9 release adds local text-to-speech controls and new interaction behavior. The PnTMC alternate is `ThatMob's Verity 2.1.0 by PnTMC [Add-on] - V26.30.mcaddon`, record `8327253`. Point-in-time CurseForge project totals are 1,950,264, 3,550,887, and 6,240,846 downloads respectively; the Modrinth Verity JE project total is 180,575. NeoForge 1.21.1 remains a separate older branch, and VERITY.exe is a separate modpack route. The site does not host files, upload selected files, collect API keys, or claim that metadata or checksum matching is a malware scan.
